summary: Tested HR & Business features: QR Scanner for attendance, Employee Loan Management, Employee Upgrade Module, and Fabric Catalogue categories. Fixed 3 backend bugs in server.py (datetime timezone handling for loan eligibility, NoneType handling for salary_info, and uuid4 reference). All 6 backend tests pass (100%). All 4 frontend features verified working.

features_tested.feature: QR Scanner button on Face Attendance page
features_tested.details: Purple 'Scan ID Card' button present in header. Opens QR Scanner dialog for employee attendance.

features_tested.feature: Employee Loan Management page loads with summary cards
features_tested.details: Page shows Pending Approvals, Active Loans, Outstanding Amount cards. All Loans list section displays correctly.

features_tested.feature: New Loan Request dialog shows employee eligibility check
features_tested.details: Dialog displays eligibility info (2+ years service required, max ₹10,000). Shows employee service years and available amount.

features_tested.feature: Employee Upgrade button appears on employee cards
features_tested.details: Green 'Upgrade' button visible on all employee cards in the Employees page.

features_tested.feature: Employee Upgrade dialog shows current status and allows updating
features_tested.details: Dialog shows Current Designation, Current Salary, and allows updating to new designation/salary with effective date and reason. Upgrade History displayed.
CLOTHING_TYPES includes: Winter Blazer, Summer Blazer, Wedding Coat & Suits, Formal Coat & Suits, Waistcoat, Coat, Formal Pants. Visible in Add Fabric dialog's 'Suitable For' section.

bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.issue: Loan eligibility API was failing with 'can't subtract offset-naive and offset-aware datetimes'
bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.fix: Added timezone awareness to join_date parsing: if join_date.tzinfo is None: join_date = join_date.replace(tzinfo=timezone.utc)

bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.issue: Upgrade history and upgrade API failing with 'NoneType object has no attribute get'
bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.fix: Changed employee.get('salary_info', {}) to employee.get('salary_info') or {} to handle None case

bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.issue: Upgrade API failing with 'name uuid4 is not defined'

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing employees: ahmad (firdous), Test Employee (EMP0001)
context_for_next_testing_agent: HR features are fully functional. QR Scanner is on Face Attendance page (sidebar: HR MANAGEMENT > Face Attendance). Employee Loans is accessible from sidebar (HR MANAGEMENT > Employee Loans). Employee Upgrade is via the 'Upgrade' button on employee cards in the Employees page. Fabric Catalogue expanded categories are in the 'Suitable For' multi-select when adding new fabrics.
